purpose: Transparent wood-resource presentation icon with faithful runtime derivatives for the separately reviewed Alpha 0.3.7 shared-world resource authority; the artwork alone is not evidence of a balance, currency, reward, or entitlement.

projectAuthorization.scope: Add the background-cleaned wood icon to Warpkeep PR #45's noninteractive presentation-only Realm HUD and permit its future official Warpkeep Pages runtime use; this authorization does not implement or prove any mechanics, balance, or entitlement.
notGranted: general third-party derivative or redistribution permission
currency, reward, value, or entitlement rights

sourceInputs.runtimeUse: visual composition and wood-resource icon style reference only

generation.prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: transparent in-game resource icon for Warpkeep's Realm HUD
Input image: the supplied wood/log bundle is the edit target.
Primary request: preserve the supplied stacked cut logs, rope, plank, warm brown materials, painterly high-quality game-icon style, centered composition, and overall silhouette. Remove the checkerboard completely and replace it with one perfectly flat, uniform #00ff00 chroma-key background for local background removal.
Composition/framing: square icon, wood bundle centered with generous clear padding on all sides; no cropping.
Constraints: change only the background. Keep the subject opaque, crisp, cleanly separated from the background. Do not put any #00ff00 on the wood, rope, or plank. No cast shadow, contact shadow, floor, reflection, glow, text, badge, watermark, border, extra objects, gradients, or texture in the background.

referenceAsset.delivery: checked-in provenance master outside public/; only the exact reviewed 64 px faithful derivatives below are served by Pages

runtimeDerivative.authorizationBasis: The separately reviewed Alpha 0.3.7 resource authority activates the previously recorded owner authorization for official Warpkeep Pages runtime use.

installation.family: all eight Hegemony resource runtime outputs

licence.policy: The exact project instruction authorizes the recorded Warpkeep use but does not establish a public relicensing grant. See ASSETS-LICENSE.md.
